creator: gshapiro@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Maxim: Thank you for the report, I've fixed the code (using quoting) in the upstream source repo.  Do you the fix added to FreeBSD immediately or can it wait for the next upstream import?

Also, would you like credit in the sendmail open source release notes?  If so, what is your preferred attribution?  E.g., "Problem reported by Maxim Shalomikhin of Kaspersky."
